part.text:
---
## Goal
- Rename "MaxEntries" to "MaxQuotas" for all related symbols in the ratelimit package and config.Controller struct across the boundary repository

## Constraints & Preferences
- The task is complete when the change is applied everywhere and the project typechecks
- All references throughout the codebase must be updated consistently

## Progress
### Done
- Renamed `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/ratelimit.DefaultLimiterMaxEntries` -> `DefaultLimiterMaxQuotas` (29 references, 7 files)
- Renamed `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/ratelimit.initDefaultLimiterMaxEntries` -> `initDefaultLimiterMaxQuotas` (2 references, 1 file)
- Renamed `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/ratelimit.defaultLimiterMaxEntries` -> `defaultLimiterMaxQuotas` (3 references, 1 file)
- Renamed `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/ratelimit.TestDefaulLimiterMaxEntries` -> `TestDefaulLimiterMaxQuotas` (1 reference, 1 file)
- Renamed struct field `Controller.ApiRateLimiterMaxEntries` -> `ApiRateLimiterMaxQuotas` in config.Controller

### In Progress
- Verify all renames are consistent across the repository
- Ensure project typechecks after all symbol changes

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Used `ago_rename` for function/variable symbols as they support automatic renaming of references
- Renamed struct field directly by replacing with corrected definition rather than using non-field-aware tools
- Applied renames in correct order: public functions first, then variables, finally struct fields

## Next Steps
1. Run typecheck to validate all symbol references resolve correctly
2. Review any remaining "MaxEntries" occurrences that may have been missed
3. Update documentation or comments referencing the old names if present

## Critical Context
- All renames were applied successfully using automated tools
- The config.Controller struct field rename required special handling to replace within type definition
- ratelimit package functions and variables had multiple file references (up to 29 for DefaultLimiterMaxEntries)
- Test files need to be updated alongside implementation files

## Relevant Files
- `boundary/internal/ratelimit/config.go` - contains all the renamed functions, variables
- `boundary/internal/ratelimit/config_test.go` - TestDefaulLimiterMaxEntries rename applied
- `boundary/internal/cmd/config/config.go` - Controller struct field rename applied
